name: Dropbox
description: Dropbox is a cloud file storage and synchronization service. The API lets you upload, download, organize, search, and share files and folders stored in a user's Dropbox account programmatically.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file to Dropbox at a specified path (up to 150 MB).

capabilities.name: files_download
capabilities.description: Download a file from Dropbox by its path or ID.

capabilities.name: files_get_metadata
capabilities.description: Get metadata for a file or folder.

capabilities.name: files_list_folder
capabilities.description: List the contents of a folder.

capabilities.name: files_list_folder_continue
capabilities.description: Continue listing folder contents from a cursor.

capabilities.name: files_create_folder
capabilities.description: Create a new folder at the specified path.

capabilities.name: files_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a file or folder at the specified path.

capabilities.name: files_move
capabilities.description: Move a file or folder to a different location.

capabilities.name: files_copy
capabilities.description: Copy a file or folder to a different location.

capabilities.name: files_search
capabilities.description: Search for files and folders by name or content.

capabilities.name: files_get_temporary_link
capabilities.description: Get a temporary link to stream content of a file.

capabilities.name: files_get_thumbnail
capabilities.description: Get a thumbnail for an image file.

capabilities.name: files_upload_session_start
capabilities.description: Start an upload session for files larger than 150 MB.

capabilities.name: files_upload_session_append
capabilities.description: Append more data to an upload session.

capabilities.name: files_upload_session_finish
capabilities.description: Finish an upload session and save the file.

capabilities.name: sharing_create_shared_link
capabilities.description: Create a shared link for a file or folder.

capabilities.name: sharing_list_shared_links
capabilities.description: List shared links for a file or across the account.

capabilities.name: sharing_revoke_shared_link
capabilities.description: Revoke a shared link.

capabilities.name: sharing_add_file_member
capabilities.description: Share a file with another user.

capabilities.name: sharing_list_file_members
capabilities.description: List members who have access to a shared file.

capabilities.name: users_get_current_account
capabilities.description: Get information about the current user's account.

capabilities.name: users_get_space_usage
capabilities.description: Get the space usage information for the current user.

capabilities.name: users_get_account
capabilities.description: Get information about a specific user's account by account ID.

capabilities.name: file_requests_create
capabilities.description: Create a file request for others to upload files to your Dropbox.

capabilities.name: file_requests_list
capabilities.description: List all file requests.

capabilities.name: file_requests_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific file request.

capabilities.name: file_requests_update
capabilities.description: Update a file request.

capabilities.name: file_requests_delete
capabilities.description: Delete file requests.
